properties.name: Feature: Steadfast5e - Award Treasure XP
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Part of the Steadfast5e suite. Adds the classic OSR "XP for gold" house rule: run /goldxp to open a small tool, enter the GP value of treasure recovered and a ratio (1/2/5/10 GP per XP), and award the resulting XP evenly across the party -- reuses the same PartyXPManager.awardXP() the stock Battle/Quest "Award" buttons call.
